wto_idb_research.objective: Document available sources for WTO IDB (Integrated Database) tariff-line level data download

key_findings.summary: WTO IDB data is available through multiple platforms with varying access restrictions. The most accessible option for free tariff-line data is WITS (World Integrated Trade Solution) via World Bank.
key_findings.data_detail_level: Tariff-line level (8-10 digit HS codes) applied duty rates and import statistics

primary_sources.name: WTO Tariff & Trade Data (TTD)
primary_sources.access_level: Restricted - Login required for IDB downloads
primary_sources.description: Official WTO platform providing tariff and trade data for 170+ economies. Currently in beta version.
primary_sources.download_formats: HTML, PDF, and raw data downloads available
primary_sources.tariff_detail: HS 6-digit level via ADB, tariff-line (8-10 digit) for authorized users
primary_sources.notes: IDB data downloads are accessible only to WTO Member governments and authorized international organizations

primary_sources.name: WTO IDB Download Portal
primary_sources.description: Dedicated IDB download section requiring WTO member credentials
primary_sources.data_available: Applied and preferential tariff rates, import statistics at tariff-line level
primary_sources.coverage: From 1996 onward, organized by year and economy

primary_sources.name: WTO Data Portal
primary_sources.description: WTO's main data portal with IDB dataset information
primary_sources.update_frequency: Monthly updates with new member submissions

primary_sources.name: Legacy Tariff Download Facility
primary_sources.status: Superseded by WTO Tariff & Trade Data (TTD)
primary_sources.notes: Available formats were Excel, XML, CSV. Data at HS 6-digit level.

free_alternatives.name: World Bank WITS
data_available: MFN Applied tariffs at tariff-line level (8-10 digit HS)
Import statistics by country of origin
free_alternatives.tariff_line_capability: Yes - 8-digit and higher HS codes available
free_alternatives.description: Comprehensive trade database developed by World Bank in collaboration with UNCTAD, ITC, UNSD, and WTO
free_alternatives.data_sources: WTO IDB, CTS, ADB, UN Comtrade, ITC, Trade Data Monitor
free_alternatives.harmonization_note: Data harmonized across countries at HS 6-digit level; 8-10 digit data available but computed averages use all reported tariffs

recommended_access.why: Free access to WTO IDB data for 150+ countries at HS 6-digit and limited 8-10 digit tariff-line level
recommended_access.next_step: For authorized users: WTO TTD at https://ttd.wto.org/en/download/idb for complete 8-10 digit coverage
